findings.thread_isolation_guard: shouldIngestRumor(rumor, peerPubkeyHex) at directMessages.ts:204 — thread isolation only (sender must match expected peer). Explicitly bypassed by bell watcher (comment at directMessageNotifications.ts:107-108). NOT a whitelist guard.
findings.unwrap_and_open_auth_chain: 4-step NIP-59 auth at directMessages.ts:230-282: outer wrap decrypt → seal schnorr verify → seal decrypt → rumor.pubkey===seal.pubkey binding → rumor.id hash check. Must be preserved verbatim (AC-SEC-9).
findings.contact_store_write_paths: 3 paths: (1) rememberContactsFromGroups(groups, own) — safe, MLS-derived; (2) rememberContact(peer) from bell watcher kind-4+kind-1059 handlers — NO whitelist gate currently; (3) writeContactEntry() from buildDispatcher on profile rumors — safe (MLS member).
findings.bell_watcher_guards: Only 2 guards before incrementDirectMessage: self-exclusion (peer===ownLower) and timestamp dedup (createdMs <= lastReadAt). NO contact-membership check.
findings.contactchat_ingest_paths: 3 paths all call appendMessage without member check: handleKind4Event (line 282, filtered by NDK subscription authors:[peer]), handleGiftWrapEvent (line 297, after unwrapAndOpen+shouldIngestRumor), handleHistoricalGiftWrapEvent (line 236, same).
findings.unread_store_api: clearDirectMessageContact(peerPubkeyHex) at unreadStore.ts:256 removes both localStorage timestamp and in-memory counter. This is the correct teardown call for purge.
findings.idb_key_pattern: DM threads: quizzl:messages:dm:<peerHex-lowercase>. Reaction aggregates: quizzl:reactions:dm:<peerHex>. keys() from idb-keyval imported in chatPersistence.ts:310 and reactions/api.ts:436 — both use prefix-filter patterns.
findings.group_member_pubkeys: Group.memberPubkeys at types/index.ts:170. Updated by membersChanged() guard in MarmotContext.tsx:803. Already iterated by rememberContactsFromGroups — natural whitelist source.

patterns: shouldIngestRumor is thread-isolation, not whitelist — callers must add the whitelist check on top of it
seenMessageIds/seenRumorIds dedup sets per subscription lifetime — must NOT be populated for stranger events (AC-SEC-4, AC-SEC-5)
self-exclusion guard (peer===ownLower) present in both bell-watcher handlers
serialised-write queue per IDB key prevents concurrent read-modify-write races
Group.memberPubkeys is the only existing structured 'trusted peers' set in the codebase

findings.layer_order: types/ → lib/ → context/ → components/ → pages/hooks/. Strict direction enforced in practice. New walledGarden.ts belongs in lib/ (pure function, no React deps).
findings.marmot_context_lifecycle: Group-lifecycle events: group joined (client.groups.on joined, line 625), member list changed (onMembersChanged callback in subscribeToGroupMessages, line 798 — calls persistGroup + reloadGroups), group left (leaveGroup(), line 1141 — purges per-group IDB). NO exported callback for 'member added/removed'; consumers must react to the groups array re-render or groupDataVersion counter bump.
findings.marmot_lib_modules: chatPersistence.ts (IDB R/W), groupStorage.ts (metadata), applicationRumorDispatcher.ts+registerHandlers.ts (pub/sub), handlers/ (per-kind), welcomeSubscription.ts (kind-1059 Welcome), memberGuard.ts (membersChanged utility).
findings.idb_key_namespaces: quizzl:messages:<groupId> (group threads), quizzl:messages:dm:<peerHex> (DM threads), quizzl:reactions:group:<groupId>, quizzl:reactions:dm:<peerHex>. keys() API available in both chatPersistence and reactions/api.
findings.unread_store_structure: Module-singleton (let state, line 23). directMessages keyed by peerPubkeyHex.toLowerCase(). Persistence: lp_unreadLastReadDM_v1 localStorage as Record<string,number>. clearDirectMessageContact(peer) is the purge API.
findings.contacts_write_paths: StoredContact: {pubkeyHex, firstSeenAt, lastSeenAt, archivedAt}. No 'trusted' boolean. Contact existence IS the implicit trust signal. writeContactEntry via contactCache.ts:41 also writes contact on profile rumors.
findings.no_exported_member_change_callback: MarmotContext does not export a callback for 'peer added' or 'peer removed'. The purge must be triggered by detecting group array changes via useEffect on groups/groupDataVersion.
findings.clearAllReactions_pattern: reactions/api.ts:425 clearAllReactions() already enumerates quizzl:reactions:group:* and quizzl:reactions:dm:* via keys()+prefix filter — pattern to follow for purgeStrangerReactions.
findings.test_bridge: window.__nostlingTest.onChatIdbWrite fires on every appendMessage write — available for e2e assertion of zero IDB writes for stranger events.

findings.test_framework: Unit: Vitest (app/vitest.config.ts:7, include: tests/unit/**/*.test.ts). E2E: Playwright (node scripts/run-e2e.mjs <spec>). Path alias @ → app/ root.
findings.identities: USER_A (aa.repeat(16)), USER_B (bb.repeat(16)), USER_C (cc.repeat(16)) in auth-helpers.ts:10-32. USER_C is available for Mallory role — no dedicated stranger identity exists. Must be designated as Mallory in walled-garden specs.
findings.two_context_boot_pattern: context.addInitScript seeds identity → page.goto('/') → clearAppState(page) wipes it → page.evaluate re-seeds. Then peer publishes via in-browser dynamic import of publishDirectMessage. Canonical template: dm-giftwrap-bell.spec.ts:98-196.
findings.in_browser_publish: page.evaluate(async (...) => { const { publishDirectMessage } = await import('@/src/lib/directMessages'); ... }) — honouring publish-via-app rule. dm-giftwrap-bell.spec.ts:166-192.
findings.idb_seeding_pattern: Pre-seed via page.evaluate with raw indexedDB.open / tx.objectStore('keyval').put(value, key). DB: 'keyval-store', store: 'keyval'. Key: 'quizzl:messages:dm:<peerHex>'. Helper: idb-record.ts writeIdbRecord. Pattern: dm-self-heal.spec.ts:47-85.
findings.dm_third_party_assertions: Must invert: badge>=1 → badge==0; notification-dm-${bobPub} appears → does NOT appear; msg bubble renders → does NOT render; IDB key present → absent. The raw-WebSocket publishKind4ToRelay must be replaced by a second app context + publishDirectMessage (DD-8 Option α).
findings.unit_mock_patterns: Map-backed idb-keyval mock. FakeNdk with handlers[]. globalThis.crypto=webcrypto polyfill. localStorage via Object.defineProperty. Dynamic import after vi.mock.
findings.member_allowed_setup: AC-TEST-5 requires actual MLS group membership (not just a contact record). Must create a group and invite Bob before the DM test. groups-direct-chat-no-duplicates.spec.ts predates walled garden and uses only contact records.
findings.dm_third_party_is_raw_websocket: dm-third-party-inbound.spec.ts uses publishKind4ToRelay (raw WebSocket, CLAUDE.md narrow exception). Inversion must NOT inherit this publish method — replace with second-context publishDirectMessage.
findings.data_testids: notification-badge, notification-bell, notification-dm-${peerPubkeyHex}, msg-* (prefix), contact-detail-page, chat-input, chat-send-btn.

prior_learnings.title: kind-445 events have ephemeral authors — never filter NDK subscriptions by author
prior_learnings.relevance: low — affects group message subscriptions, not DM ingest paths

prior_learnings.title: marmot-ts self-leave: propose single-leaf Remove for per-device forget
prior_learnings.relevance: low — affects leave mechanics, not DM filtering

prior_learnings.title: e2e global-setup: port check must precede child-process spawns to avoid orphan leaks
prior_learnings.relevance: low — general e2e hygiene, no direct impact on walled-garden specs
